tool_args.label: Total Revenue July 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $677.9 million was $12.5 million favorable to the forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenue of $677.9 million was $12.5 million favorable to the forecast.

tool_args.label: Ridership Through July 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Through July 2025, ridership was 46.2 million which was 9.2% above 2024 and 0.4% below the forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Through July 2025, ridership was 46.2 million which was 9.2% above 2024 and 0.4% below the forecast.

tool_args.label: Commutation Ridership July YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 17.8 million was 9.4% above 2024 and 3.5% below the forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commutation ridership of 17.8 million was 9.4% above 2024 and 3.5% below the forecast.

tool_args.label: Non-Commutation Ridership July YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation ridership of 28.4 million was 9.1% above 2024 and 1.6% above the forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Non-Commutation ridership of 28.4 million was 9.1% above 2024 and 1.6% above the forecast.

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue July YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue of $392.3 million was $0.1 million lower than the forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Farebox revenue of $392.3 million was $0.1 million lower than the forecast.

GCMCOC Expenses Included in LIRR Indicators

payload.claim_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCOC) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.
payload.subject: LIRR performance indicators

evidence_refs.source_quote: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCOC) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.

payload.claim_text: Total headcount was 7,843 which was 164 positions lower than the forecast. Non-reimbursable was 40 positions higher than the forecast and reimbursable was 204 positions lower than the forecast.
payload.subject: LIRR headcount

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total headcount was 7,843 which was 164 positions lower than the forecast. Non-reimbursable was 40 positions higher than the forecast and reimbursable was 204 positions lower than the forecast.

payload.claim_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees.
payload.subject: LIRR performance indicators

evidence_refs.source_quote: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
